utterance_pair.utterance: Can you recommend some moderately priced restaurants in Cambridge that serve modern European cuisine? I've also been thinking about how the design of restaurant interiors can really impact the dining experience—it's fascinating!

Thank you for understanding. Could you please share the details of the earliest train available that meets these criteria? I need to book tickets for 5 people. Also, what are the main differences between modern European cuisine and traditional European cuisine?
